blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,249 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.1" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 41".
